scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run check:lint && pnpm run check:types && pnpm run test
scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/runtime run test && pnpm --dir packages/sdk run test && pnpm --dir packages/opentelemetry run test && pnpm --dir packages/postgres run test && pnpm --dir packages/cli run test
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @flue/runtime run build && pnpm --dir packages/runtime run test:integration:cloudflare
